scripts.check: prettier --check . && eslint . && tsc -b tsconfig.packages.json --pretty false && vitest run && tsc -b tsconfig.packages.json
scripts.db:migrate:local: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.db.yml exec -T postgres psql -U atlas -d atlas -f /migrations/001_atlas_core.sql
scripts.db:psql: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.db.yml exec postgres psql -U atlas -d atlas
scripts.db:seed:local: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.db.yml exec -T postgres psql -U atlas -d atlas -f /migrations/seeds/001_unknown_business_system.sql
